site.title: AI Enablement Decks
site.heading: Decks & Briefings
site.tagline: A shared home for AI Enablement presentations, orientations, and capability briefings. Each card links to a standalone deck.
site.ogDescription: AI Enablement presentations, orientations, and capability briefings — Fourth.

decks.title: FourthOS — July 16, 2026
decks.description: Connector program goes three-wide: Zendesk scoped, NetSuite unblocked; EBR + GTM tools get a platform home.

decks.title: Research & Governance Operating System
decks.description: Interactive adoption demo of the AI Decision Operating Record — a live prototype on foundation data with a 90-second guided tour, two-track operating model, and a drivable sandbox.

decks.title: FourthOS — 9 July 2026
decks.description: Weekly portfolio briefing for Carly and Christian — the connector's semantic layer ships with a governed business-term dictionary, 1,144 tests green, and two new alignment items open (AI Platform Architecture, everyday-AI cost strategy).

decks.title: FourthOS — 1 July 2026
decks.description: Connector security proven 16/16 — zero leakage — and NetSuite joins the ecosystem as connector #3 in discovery. Hardening from real alpha use deployed (rev 0000020).

decks.title: FourthOS — 24 Jun 2026
decks.description: Salesforce connector is live in production. Reporting Slice 1 complete in-repo; two decisions open for sponsors — reporting hosting topology and green-light Zendesk as connector #2.

decks.title: AI Enablement · VP Portfolio Review
decks.description: Twenty-slide story deck for VP+ leadership — what we shipped, what's in build, and how the projects add up to Fourth's intelligence platform.

decks.title: AI Enablement · Portfolio Landing
decks.description: Long-scroll leave-behind covering all 14 projects across Customer Success, Marketing, Sales, Support, and Platform.

decks.title: EBR Builder System — Team Onboarding
decks.description: How the Fourth Executive Business Review builder works and how the team uses it end-to-end.

decks.title: GTM Risk Intelligence — May 18, 2026
decks.description: Cross-channel GTM risk read for the week of May 18, 2026 — pipeline conversion, P2V health, and the customer-segment hotspots that need attention.

decks.title: GTM Risk Intelligence Report
decks.description: Cross-channel GTM risk read for April 14–16, 2026 — pipeline conversion, P2V health, and the customer-segment hotspots that need attention.

decks.title: Brinker International — Monthly Product Usage Review
decks.description: Six-pillar Brinker EBR for April 2026 — availability, scheduling methods, shift transactions, direct-release recommendation, AI compute-vs-adoption gap, and reporting engagement. Data from iQ360 ADX via the ebr-presentations pipeline (schema 0.2.1, 1,145 locations).

decks.title: Claude Cowork Mastery Guide
decks.description: 2026 starter pack + 10 power prompts for getting the most out of Claude Cowork day-to-day.

decks.title: Cowork Reference Guide
decks.description: Deep reference for Claude Cowork — memory, projects, custom instructions, integrations, and the patterns that hold it all together.

decks.title: The AI Operating System
decks.description: How Eve, Donna, and Claude Code interlock — the Notion Bridge, the handoff model, and the day-to-day operating loop.

decks.title: Continuous Claude
decks.description: The AI development environment — hooks, memory, agents, and the full Claude Code operating model.

decks.title: Continuous Claude v3 — Architecture & Flows
decks.description: Interactive node-link map of CCv3's 15 subsystems and 15 flows — click a flow to trace it through the system. Pairs with a portable JSON for other AI tooling.

decks.title: CCv3 State of Rework — Fable-5 Deep Review
decks.description: Current state -> what we are adjusting -> the elegant target. Four interactive architecture diagrams (Excalidraw), 190 confirmed review findings by severity, the four-tier backlog, and end-to-end data-flow traces.

decks.title: FourthOS Reporting System
decks.description: How every scheduled FourthOS report now records one run to a shared Notion Report Runs registry — the append-all-attempts spine keyed by a unique Run ID, the emit → upsert flow across six wired pipelines, what it resolved, and what is still open.

decks.title: FastMCP — What We Can Build
decks.description: The full capability surface of FastMCP v3 and the shape of projects we can stand up on it.

decks.title: Fourth Salesforce MCP — Kick-Off
decks.description: Project kick-off for the Fourth Salesforce MCP server — scope, architecture, and milestones.

decks.title: Fourth Salesforce MCP — Build & Deployment Plan
decks.description: Post-Headless 360 architecture, phased build (v1 Marketing pilot → v2 expansion), Token Exchange auth design, parallel work tracks, and Phase 0 status.

decks.title: Fourth Salesforce MCP — Auth Design & Reusable Pattern
decks.description: Two-leg auth design for the Salesforce MCP proxy — Entra Easy Auth at the edge, OAuth 2.0 Token Exchange (RFC 8693) downstream. The reusable pattern for Zendesk, NetSuite, and other SaaS connectors.

decks.title: Salesforce Connector — Team Update (3 June 2026)
decks.description: Plain-English status update for the wider team — the connector is live: the Friday session with Ivan, the switch off Easy Auth, standing up the Hosted MCP connection, the governance middleware, the security reviews, and the alpha→beta release ladder.

decks.title: Governed AI Access to Our Business Systems
decks.description: Executive briefing on the governed-connector pattern — how Claude reaches Salesforce under each user's own identity (read-only, audited), the reusable foundation for Zendesk, NetSuite, and Jira, and the interactive apps and dashboards it unlocks.

decks.title: Microsoft Foundry — Hosted Agents
decks.description: Foundry finally lets you ship your code as an agent — what hosted agents are, how they fit alongside MCP, and where they land in our stack.

decks.title: AI Enablement Team — Portfolio Orientation · April 2026
decks.description: Team portfolio orientation — the project map and how the pieces fit together, for onboarding and alignment.

decks.title: Salesforce Data Dictionary — Proposal
decks.description: Proposal for a Salesforce data dictionary — the object/field catalog underpinning the connector and downstream reporting.
